action: Retrieve avatar IDs using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id}.
fallback_action: Retry the avatar retrieval API up to 3 times with increasing delay intervals. If retries fail, use avatar IDs saved from the last successful session stored in memory. If no previous avatar data is available, assign default hardcoded avatar IDs to each genre: Politics: 3056; Business: 3055; Sports: 3054; Breaking News: 3053; Weather: 3052

recipe.steps: Fetch avatar IDs using the specified API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id}.
recipe.generalized_functions:
import requests

user_id = {user_id} # Placeholder for user ID
api_url = f"https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id}"
response = requests.get(api_url)
avatars = response.json()
print(avatars)

recipe.steps: Save the retrieved avatar IDs in memory under the key 'avatar_ids'.
